top_unparsed: If this is a Steel Cage or Liger's Den match, you may flip both cards instead.
If you have a card with "Training With" in the name revealed, you may draw N card and bury N card in your hand.
If your Finish roll is N or less, it is +N.
Each player adds the bottom card of their deck to their hand or stop any lead <S>.
If either player has fewer than N cards in their hand, they draw N cards.
Stop any Follow Up <S> or "Rejected!".
Your opponent reveals the top card of their deck, they may flip it.
Each player adds the bottom card of their deck to their hand or stop any Follow Up <S>.
This match has no disqualifications.
Randomly add N card from your discard pile to your hand or each player draws N card.
Draw the bottom card of your deck.
If your opponent forces you to discard any number of cards from your hand, shuffle up to N cards from your discard pile into your deck.
Add N <S>s from your discard pile to your hand.
If you have another Lead in play, shuffle N <S> from your discard pile into your deck and draw N card.
If you have "N Handed Toss" in play: your <S> skill is +N and this card is also a Follow Up.
If you have "N/N Wrist Lock" in play: Your <S> skill is +N and this card is also a Follow Up.
Stop any Finish <S> that cannot be stopped.
If you have another <S> in play, discard N cards from your hand and add N card from your discard pile to your hand.
Flip N cards for each other Follow Up you have in play.
Bury up to N cards in any player's discard pile.

coverage_records.rules_text:
When your turn roll is exactly 3 less than your target's turn roll:
Your next turn roll is +1;
If it is exactly 4 less, it is +2,
If it is at least 5 less, it is +3.

Once per match:
If your Finish roll is 6 or less, it is +2.
Each player adds the bottom card of their deck to their hand or stop any lead Grapple.
Draw 1 card.

Stop any Lead Strike.
If either player has fewer than 4 cards in their hand, they draw 2 cards.

Stop any Follow Up Grapple or "Rejected!".
Your opponent reveals the top card of their deck, they may flip it.
Each player adds the bottom card of their deck to their hand or stop any Follow Up Submission.

If the Crowd Meter is 1 or greater, stop any Follow Up Strike.
This match has no disqualifications.
Randomly add 1 card from your discard pile to your hand or each player draws 1 card.

Draw the bottom card of your deck.
If your opponent forces you to discard any number of cards from your hand, shuffle up to 3 cards from your discard pile into your deck.
Discard 2 cards from your hand.  Add 2 Submissions from your discard pile to your hand.
If you have another Lead in play, shuffle 1 Strike from your discard pile into your deck and draw 1 card.
If you have "2 Handed Toss" in play: your Grapple skill is +1 and this card is also a Follow Up.
If you have "3/4 Wrist Lock" in play: Your Submission skill is +1 and this card is also a Follow Up.
Stop any Finish Grapple that cannot be stopped. Your opponent's maximum hand size is -1.

Flip 1 card.
Put 1 card from your discard pile on top of your deck.
If you have a card with "Training With" in the name revealed, you may draw 1 card and bury 1 card in your hand.

If your Submission skill is greater than your opponent's Submission skill, stop any Strike.
Shuffle 2 cards from your discard pile into your deck.
Skill requirement: Grapple 8+
If you have another Strike in play, discard 2 cards from your hand and add 1 card from your discard pile to your hand.
Your next turn roll is +1 for each Lead your opponent has in play.
Flip 2 cards for each other Follow Up you have in play.

Your opponent randomly discards 1 card from their hand.
Bury up to 2 cards in any player's discard pile.
If this is a Ring of Fire or Lumberjack match, double these numbers.

If your opponent has another Submission in play, stop any Submission.
If you have a card with "Training With" in the name revealed, you may draw 1 card and bury 1 card in your hand.
Your opponent's maximum handsize is -4.

Flip 1 card.
Take 2 cards from your discard pile, shuffle them into your deck, then draw 2 cards.

Search your deck or discard pile for 3 Grapples:
Add 1 to your hand, put 1 on the top of your deck, and bury or put the other in your discard pile.
If this is a Ring of Fire match, your opponent flips 3 cards.
Skill Requirement: Power 8+

The Crowd Meter is +1.
Draw cards equal to the Crowd Meter.

Stop any Grapple.
Each player reveals the top card of their deck and adds it to their hand.
If this is a Steel Cage or Liger's Den match, you may flip both cards instead.

Stop any Finish Submission.
Search your deck for 1 Grapple and put it on top of your shuffled deck.

Stop any Lead Strike or Finish Strike.
Shuffle 2 Submissions from your discard pile into your deck.

+3 to Agility
+2 to Strike
Reveal the top 7 cards of your deck; randomly add 3 to your hand, and flip the others.

+3 to Technique
+2 to Agility
+1 to Submission
+1 to Grapple
If stopped, your next turn roll is -3.

+1 to Power
+1 to Agility
+2 to Submission
The player with the lowest turn roll wins the turn roll.
If this is a match with a stipulation: Before the start of the match, search your deck for card #2 and add it to your hand.

+3 to Agility
+2 to Strike
Look at the top 6 cards of your opponent's deck; discard 3, bury 2, and put the last 1 on top.

+1 to Technique
+4 to Grapple
If stopped, draw 1 card for each stop your opponent has in play (Max 2).

+3 to Grapple
If either player rolled Grapple for their turn roll, this card is also a Lead.
Your next turn roll is -1.
When your turn roll is exactly 2 less than your opponet's turn roll, draw 2 cards or add 1 card with "Hammer" in the name from your discard pile to your hand.
Finishes with "Cannot Breakout" in the text instead have blank text.
Stop any Lead Grapple.  Each player reveals the top card of their deck and adds it to their hand.  If this is a Steel Cage or Liger's Den match, you may flip both cards instead.

Stop any Lead Submission.
Each player reveals the top card of their deck and adds it to their hand.
If this is a Steel Cage or Liger's Den match, you may flip both cards instead.
Each player adds the bottom card of their deck to their hand or stop any Lead Strike.

Stop any Follow Up Grapple.
Each player draws 1 card.
Stop any Follow Up Submission.  Each player buries 1 card in their opponent's discard pile.

Stop any Follow Up Stike or "Apocalypse".
Your opponent reveals the top card of their deck, they may flip it.
Draw 1 card or shuffle up to 3 cards from your discard pile into your deck.

Reveal 2 cards in your hand to your opponent.
Add 1 Grapple from your discard pile to your hand.
Draw 1 card or take 4 cards from your discard pile and randomly put them on top of your deck.
If you have another Lead in play, draw the bottom card of your deck.
If you have another Grapple in play, search your deck for 1 Grapple and put it on top of your shuffled deck.
Shuffle 1 Submission from your discard pile into your deck for each card you have in play with "Sledgehammer" in the name.

If your Strike skill is greater than your opponent's Strike skill, stop any Follow Up Grapple or Finish Grapple.
When you stop a card, the stopped card has blank text until the end of the turn.
Each player flips 1 card or if your Power skill is greater than your opponent's Power skill, stop any Submission.

If your Submission skill is greater than your opponent's Submission skill, stop any Strike.
Each player buries 1 card in their opponent's discard pile.
If you have another Follow Up or Finish Strike in play, your Agility skill is +1.

If you have another Grapple in play, put 1 card from your discard pile on top of your deck.
If this is a Steel Cage match, flip 3 cards.

If you have another Submission in play, shuffle 1 Submission from your discard pile into your deck and draw 1 card.
If you have "Reverse Hold" in play, your Finish rolls are +1.

If your opponent has another Grapple in play, stop any Grapple.
Each player draws 1 card.

If  your opponent has another Submission in play, stop any Submission.
The Crowd Meter is considered -1 for all Stop text.
Each player adds the bottom card of their deck to their hand or if your opponent has another Strike in play, stop any Strike.

Shuffle 2 cards from your discard pile into your deck.
If your Strike skill is greater than your opponent's Agility skill, draw 3 cards.

Discard 1 card your opponent has in play, shuffle 2 cards from your discard pile into your deck.
Draw 1 card.

Choose a skill: your opponent's skill of that type is -1.
The next time you roll that skill, draw 1 card.
Stop any Lead Grapple or Finish Grapple.  Bury up to 3 cards in your opponent's discard pile.

Stop any Follow Up Submission or Finish Submission.
Bury 1 card in your discard pile.

Stop any Finish Strike.
Your Finish rolls are +1.  Skill Requirement: Submission 8+

+2 to Power
+3 to Agility
Your Agility skill is +1 for each card you have in play with "Hammer", "Smash", "High", or "Strike" in the name.

+2 to Power
+2 to Grapple
Bury 4 cards in your opponent's discard pile.

+1 to Submission
